title: Rivet 1 Shaders
description: this its ERI2026 first shaders please be patient and report any bugs
body:
🌾 RIvet 1 – Semi-Vanilla Minecraft Shaders

The first shader from the RYE Concern series.
RIvet 1 brings a semi-realistic look to Minecraft without losing its original charm. It focuses on warm, natural lighting, soft shadows, and realistic reflections — all balanced to feel immersive, not overdone.

✨ Features:

Smooth global lighting inspired by realistic daylight behavior.

Subtle bloom and balanced tonemapping for natural contrast.

Light reflections and gentle water shimmer — no overblown gloss.

Optimized performance — should run smoothly even on low-range GPUs (like RX 580 / GTX 1660TI).

💡 Vision:
Rivet 1 aims to make Minecraft feel more alive and atmospheric while staying true to its blocky roots. It’s realism that respects the original art style — not replaces it. we recomend to join our server to report bugs or things we could improve project for now has been not our focus so there wont be updates soon we are sorry
